name: Sundar Pichai
executiveSummary:
Sundar Pichai is an Indian-born American business executive who serves as the Chief Executive Officer of Alphabet Inc. and its subsidiary Google. He is responsible for Google's most critical products, including Android, Chrome, YouTube, and Google Cloud.

Under Pichai's leadership, Google has aggressively expanded its AI capabilities, transitioning the company into an 'AI-first' organization. He is known for his calm, diplomatic leadership style and his engineering expertise.
biography:
Born in Madurai, India, Pichai earned his degree in metallurgical engineering from the Indian Institute of Technology Kharagpur. Moving to the United States, he attained an M.S. from Stanford University in materials science and engineering, and an MBA from the Wharton School of the University of Pennsylvania.

He worked in engineering and product management at Applied Materials and in management consulting at McKinsey & Company before joining Google in 2004. At Google, he led the product management and innovation efforts for a suite of client software products, including Google Chrome and ChromeOS, as well as being largely responsible for Google Drive. He went on to oversee the development of different applications such as Gmail and Google Maps.

Pichai was selected to become the next CEO of Google in 2015, as part of the restructuring process that made Alphabet Inc. into Google's parent company. In 2019, he became the CEO of Alphabet Inc.

recentNews.title: Google Gemini Era
recentNews.description: Leading the rollout of the Gemini AI models across all Alphabet products to compete in the generative AI race.

recentNews.title: Antitrust Hearings
recentNews.description: Testifying and navigating Google through historic DOJ antitrust lawsuits regarding search monopolies.
